update.name: Below-Logger-Symlink-Attack_CVE-2025-27591
update.description: A Bash-based privilege escalation exploit targeting the `below` system performance monitoring tool. This refurbished exploit leverages a symlink vulnerability in the logging mechanism to inject a root user into `/etc/passwd`, achieving full root access.
